channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Wish Upon a Jirachi in Pokémon Pokopia
item.description: Join the Wish Upon a Jirachi event from June 23 to July 8, 2026, and help make Pokémon dreams come true. Befriend Jirachi and enjoy the festivities!

item.title: Round Up: The Reviews Are In For The Adventures Of Elliot: The Millenium Tales
item.description: Critics have shared their reviews for Square Enix's new HD-2D title, The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales. Check out the highlights and feedback from various sources.

item.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
item.description: Learn how to disable the intrusive 'write with Gemini' pop-ups in Google Docs. Follow these simple steps to regain control over your writing experience.

item.title: Yakuza Creator's Gang of Dragon PS5 Game Really Does Seem Dead
item.description: Evidence suggests that the Yakuza creator's new game, Gang of Dragon, may be canceled. Fans are left wondering about the future of this anticipated title.

item.title: Everything you need to know from State of Unreal 2026
item.description: Unreal Engine 6 and 5.8 were unveiled at the State of Unreal keynote. Key highlights include significant updates and a $1 billion payout to UEFN developers.

item.title: Street Fighter 6 DLC character Yasmine launches August 3
item.description: Capcom announced that Yasmine, a new character for Street Fighter 6, will be available on August 3. Get ready for exciting new gameplay options!

item.title: Pixel Screenshots no longer exclusively uses on-device AI
item.description: Pixel Screenshots now utilizes cloud processing alongside on-device AI. This update enhances performance and capabilities for users.

item.title: ALS Patient Gains Ability to Speak Using Experimental Brain-Computer Interface
item.description: A groundbreaking brain-computer interface developed at UC Davis allows an ALS patient to communicate and work full-time. This innovation offers hope for many.

item.title: Is the Trump T1 Just an HTC Phone Painted Gold?
item.description: CNET's review suggests the Trump phone is a rebranded HTC U24 Pro. The findings raise questions about its originality and value.

item.title: OnePlus just launched an unexpected upgrade to its best flagship killer phone
item.description: OnePlus has unveiled an unexpected upgrade to its flagship killer phone, enhancing performance and features. Details on the new model are now available.

item.title: Apple’s new software drops support for these 16 products
item.description: Apple's latest software update drops support for 16 products, including older iPads and Macs. Users should check compatibility before upgrading.

item.title: Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney calls for Team Open to address game industry’s challenges
item.description: Tim Sweeney urges the gaming industry to unite and tackle challenges posed by competitors like Roblox. His call for collaboration aims to strengthen the sector.

item.title: Rockstar Announces Free PS5 And Xbox Series X/S Upgrade For Grand Theft Auto V
item.description: Rockstar Games will offer free upgrades for GTA V owners on last-gen consoles to current-gen versions. This move excites fans awaiting GTA VI.

item.title: Dispatch just got a Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch update to reduce censorship
item.description: AdHoc Studio released a new update for Dispatch on Nintendo Switch 2, addressing censorship issues. The patch is now available for download.

item.title: The chaos continues
item.description: Minecraft kicks off summer with community challenges, multiplayer experiences, and a Marketplace Summer Sale. Join the fun and explore new features!
